description: Engineered robust, high-availability backend microservices for global banking platforms. Focused intensely on security, transaction performance, and system integrity.
Led the development of scalable logistics systems handling millions of daily events. Architected complex AWS cloud solutions for real-time tracking.
Built mission-critical transactional platforms with rigorous compliance standards and zero-downtime deployment requirements.
Designing and building premium, user-centric software products. Combining deep backend engineering expertise with modern frontend craftsmanship.
